title: IN PHOTOS: How Mumbaikars are battling recent rising mercury in city - Mid-day
full_text:
People step out amid intense heat near Abdul Rehman Street, opposite Crawford Market (Ashish Raje)
An AC cab driver waits inside his vehicle, seeking relief as Mumbai’s temperatures hover between 29 and 31 degrees Celsius (Pic/Ashish Raje)
Pedestrians navigate the sweltering afternoon heat along Abdul Rehman Street, opposite Crawford Market (Pic/Ashish Raje)
A boy cools down with an ice gola at Girgaon Chowpatty, a popular summer treat amid rising temperatures
Pedestrians navigate the sweltering afternoon heat along Abdul Rehman Street, opposite Crawford Market (Pic/Sayyed Sameer Abedi)
Boys dive into the sea near Juhu Koliwada, beating the heat with a refreshing swim amid the scorching summer sun (Pic/Satej Shinde)
